overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The character crosses a street, walks along a sidewalk with orange railings, enters a plaza with a 'MASALA STUDIOS' sign, goes inside a small shop with vending machines, and exits back to the plaza. The environment features heavy neon lighting, futuristic architecture, and sparse pedestrian activity.

stepping onto the sidewalk from the crosswalk

person in blue jacket walking ahead of the camera

tall futuristic building with illuminated windows and neon accents
tropical palm trees lining the street
large vertical digital advertisement screen on building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a futuristic city intersection marked by a 'Farrier' street sign. The character crosses an asphalt crosswalk with yellow stripes while a futuristic truck passes on the right. Tall glass office towers with neon lighting rise in the background, and palm trees line the street. The scene transitions to the concrete sidewalk as the character continues walking forward.

events.description: moving from open intersection to covered sidewalk section with railings
slight turn to the right to follow the sidewalk curve

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to a busy street with futuristic vehicles passing by

notable_agents.action: green military-style truck driving past on the street

elevated train or walkway structure spanning between buildings
large illuminated yellow sign for 'MASALA STUDIOS'

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk bordered by bright orange safety railings on the left. An elevated transit structure spans overhead between futuristic glass towers. The MASALA STUDIOS sign becomes visible in the distance on the left. Vehicles including a green truck pass by on the right side of the railing.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with seating and graffiti art walls

events.description: entering the MASALA STUDIOS plaza area from the main street
approaching the shop entrance with neon 'OPEN' sign visible

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza toward the MASALA STUDIOS building entrance, passing by seated individuals

notable_agents.action: person sitting on white modular couch in the plaza
muscular character with green hair and cybernetic implants walking past

entered.detail: modern white outdoor seating furniture in the plaza
large wall covered in colorful cyberpunk-style graffiti and street art
futuristic blue and white equipment box with orange railings
open shop doorway with roll-up shutter

segments.scene_description: The character enters a semi-enclosed plaza with paved tile flooring. A large illuminated 'MASALA STUDIOS' sign dominates the left side, while a white modular couch sits in the center where a person is resting. The left wall features extensive cyberpunk graffiti art. The character approaches a shop entrance with an orange neon 'OPEN' sign.

scene_state.functional_zone: small convenience shop with vending machines and seating

events.description: entering the indoor shop through the open roll-up shutter door
turning to look at the wall of vending machines on the left

agents.ego_description: entering the shop and looking around at the vending machines, seating area, and posters on the walls

entered.detail: row of red vending machines labeled 'Insta Food' with hot dog advertisements
stacked red plastic chairs around small tables
posters on the wall advertising fights including 'FIGHT' and 'LAWLESS'
rotating ceiling fan with integrated lighting
service counter with display cases in the back of the shop

segments.scene_description: The character enters a small indoor shop with marble tile flooring. The left wall features a row of red 'Insta Food' vending machines. Red plastic chairs are stacked around tables in the center, and boxing posters decorate the right wall. The space is lit by fluorescent ceiling lights and a rotating ceiling fan. The character explores the interior, looking at the vending machines and posters.

scene_state.functional_zone: return to the MASALA STUDIOS plaza area

events.description: exiting the shop back to the outdoor plaza

agents.ego_description: exiting the shop and looking around the plaza at the people sitting on the couches

notable_agents.action: two people sitting and conversing on the white modular couch

entered.detail: large illuminated yellow sign now viewed from the plaza side
white outdoor seating with people resting

segments.scene_description: The character exits the shop back into the MASALA STUDIOS plaza. The illuminated yellow sign is visible again on the left. Two people are now sitting on the white modular couch in the center of the plaza conversing. The camera looks around the plaza, showing the graffiti wall and scattered debris on the paved ground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling futuristic intersection into a quiet studio plaza and a small interior shop. It begins at a city crosswalk marked by a Farrier street sign, moving past palm trees and glass towers as a futuristic truck passes by. As the character reaches the concrete sidewalk, the view shifts along bright orange safety railings under an elevated transit structure, gradually revealing the illuminated Masala Studios sign in the distance. The scene then opens into a paved plaza featuring cyberpunk graffiti and a modular couch before the camera follows the character through an orange neon open sign into a small shop filled with red vending machines and boxing posters. Finally, the camera retreats from the fluorescent-lit interior back into the open air of the plaza, where the yellow studio sign glows again above people conversing on the central couch.
